_comment: Per-entry template for a community app. The platform polls ONE file — community/sources.json — so to list your app: fork Velaris-App-OS/Marketplace, add ONE object like the one below (drop this _comment) to the packages[] array in community/sources.json, point download_url at your hosted .hxapp, and open a PR. Your package is ALWAYS Community tier — _effective_tier grants Official only to ids in official_registry.json served from the official/ folder, which a community entry cannot be; this file never decides tier. checksum_sha256 must be the sha256 of the exact .hxapp at download_url (verified at install).
name: Your App Name
description: One-line description of what your app does.
